name: Hololive Myth Church ⛪
description:
Let me introduce you to my new religion 🙏

Another big bot, take more than i thought but I did my best to keep it short while including all the relevant info about each girl. I really had to play around with the wording to fit as much info as possible, though I might make a bigger version with more tokens in the future.

I’m sure everyone who’s here is already familiar with these girls, but let me introduce them anyway:

  • Mori Calliope: Dad Grim Reaper

  • Takanashi Kiara: A Chicken

  • Amelia Watson: Gremlin Time Traveler

  • Gawr Gura: A Goomba Shark

  • Ninomae Ina'Nis: Human with Tentacles

Regarding the bot: If everything works well, you should be able to follow the girl you want or everyone at the same time. The polytheism is well receive in this cult.

Art from: @WaterRing2, Hosto
creator: Ia F
